news.title:
Adani Power saw an NSE block trade of 1,579,389 shares for Rs. 24.5 cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 155.3 per share.
news.summary:
Adani Power saw an NSE block trade of 1,579,389 shares for Rs. 24.5 cr.
The trade was executed at Rs. 155.3 per share.

news.title:
Eight stocks, including Adani Power, Cochin Shipyard, and Hyundai Motor India, enter the F&O segment starting April 1.
HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Technologies, and Torrent Power exit F&O post this series; stock lot sizes vary by company.
news.summary:
Eight stocks, including Adani Power, Cochin Shipyard, and Hyundai Motor India, enter the F&O segment starting April 1.
HUDCO, Piramal Pharma, Tata Technologies, and Torrent Power exit F&O post this series; stock lot sizes vary by company.

news.title:
Crisil assigns 'AA Stable' rating to Adani Power's ₹12,000 Cr term loan facilities.
Existing bank facilities & proposed NCDs of ₹57,000 Cr reaffirmed 'AA Stable' rating.
news.summary:
Crisil assigns 'AA Stable' rating to Adani Power's ₹12,000 Cr term loan facilities.
Existing bank facilities & proposed NCDs of ₹57,000 Cr reaffirmed 'AA Stable' rating.

news.title:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.
news.summary:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.

news.title:
Adani Power's supply to Gujarat fell 15% in 2025 amid rising demand.
Adani Power supplied 13,203 MUs in 2025, down from 15,491 MUs in 2024.
news.summary:
Adani Power's supply to Gujarat fell 15% in 2025 amid rising demand.
Adani Power supplied 13,203 MUs in 2025, down from 15,491 MUs in 2024.

news.title:
BTL EPC secures a ₹590Cr order from Adani Power for CHP & AHP systems in Bihar.
The project involves design, engineering, supply, and commissioning for a 3,800MW thermal plant.
news.summary:
BTL EPC secures a ₹590Cr order from Adani Power for CHP & AHP systems in Bihar.
The project involves design, engineering, supply, and commissioning for a 3,800MW thermal plant.

news.title:
SC rejects UPJVNL's appeal against Essar Power MP's insolvency resolution; Adani Power emerged as successful bidder.
NCLT, NCLAT upheld claims classification; operational creditors, including UPJVNL, received no payment under the resolution plan.
news.summary:
SC rejects UPJVNL's appeal against Essar Power MP's insolvency resolution; Adani Power emerged as successful bidder.
NCLT, NCLAT upheld claims classification; operational creditors, including UPJVNL, received no payment under the resolution plan.

news.title:
Adani Power shares fell 2.5% intraday to Rs 151, breaking a 2-day rally.
The stock had gained over 7% during the preceding two-day rally on exchanges.
news.summary:
Adani Power shares fell 2.5% intraday to Rs 151, breaking a 2-day rally.
The stock had gained over 7% during the preceding two-day rally on exchanges.

news.title:
Nifty Energy fell 1.25%, losing 451 points as crude surged to $101.25/barrel.
Adani Power gained 3.98% while Adani Total Gas dropped 5.27%; inflation risks loom.
news.summary:
Nifty Energy fell 1.25%, losing 451 points as crude surged to $101.25/barrel.
Adani Power gained 3.98% while Adani Total Gas dropped 5.27%; inflation risks loom.

news.title:
Coal power may rise amid gas, hydro shortfalls; renewables at 22% of India's generation.
Morgan Stanley sees Adani Power, JSW Energy benefiting; Tata Power, Torrent Power to gain if Section 11 is invoked.
news.summary:
Coal power may rise amid gas, hydro shortfalls; renewables at 22% of India's generation.
Morgan Stanley sees Adani Power, JSW Energy benefiting; Tata Power, Torrent Power to gain if Section 11 is invoked.

news.title:
Adani Power secures 1,600 MW contract from MSEDCL with ₹5.3/kWh tariff.
The deal follows competitive bidding; Adani Power emerged as lowest bidder.
news.summary:
Adani Power secures 1,600 MW contract from MSEDCL with ₹5.3/kWh tariff.
The deal follows competitive bidding; Adani Power emerged as lowest bidder.

news.title:
Adani Power wins LoA from MSEDCL for 1600 MW thermal power supply under a 25-year PSA starting FY2030-31.
The bid ensures long-term fuel security, part of Adani's 23.8 GW pipeline expansion targeting 41.87 GW by FY32.
news.summary:
Adani Power wins LoA from MSEDCL for 1600 MW thermal power supply under a 25-year PSA starting FY2030-31.
The bid ensures long-term fuel security, part of Adani's 23.8 GW pipeline expansion targeting 41.87 GW by FY32.

news.title:
Adani Power executed a block trade of ~1,139,383 shares at Rs. 149.84.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 17.07 crores on NSE.
news.summary:
Adani Power executed a block trade of ~1,139,383 shares at Rs. 149.84.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 17.07 crores on NSE.

news.title:
Power stocks surge led by NTPC Green Energy (+13%), JSW Energy (+7%), Adani Power (+6%). Early summer and LPG crisis boost demand.
Thermal power plants operate at 70% PLF, outperforming solar/wind. NTPC, Adani Power, JSW Energy expected to benefit per Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:
Power stocks surge led by NTPC Green Energy (+13%), JSW Energy (+7%), Adani Power (+6%). Early summer and LPG crisis boost demand.
Thermal power plants operate at 70% PLF, outperforming solar/wind. NTPC, Adani Power, JSW Energy expected to benefit per Morgan Stanley.

news.title:
NSE to add six stocks, including Adani Power & Hyundai Motor, to F&O from April 1, 2026.
Contracts subject to SEBI criteria; details on market lot size, strike prices out by March 30, 2026.
news.summary:
NSE to add six stocks, including Adani Power & Hyundai Motor, to F&O from April 1, 2026.
Contracts subject to SEBI criteria; details on market lot size, strike prices out by March 30, 2026.

news.title:
ICRA assigns AA Stable rating to Adani Power's Rs. 12,000 crore additional loans, reaffirming Rs. 69,000 crore facilities.
Rating reflects Adani Power's market leadership, asset diversification, robust revenue visibility, and strong operating efficiency.
news.summary:
ICRA assigns AA Stable rating to Adani Power's Rs. 12,000 crore additional loans, reaffirming Rs. 69,000 crore facilities.
Rating reflects Adani Power's market leadership, asset diversification, robust revenue visibility, and strong operating efficiency.

news.title:
AI poses risks and opportunities for India's IT sector; pivoting to enterprise AI consulting may slow revenue growth.
GREED & Fear reshuffles portfolio: Home First Finance replaced by Adani Power; Ixigo swapped for IndiGo; Lemon Tree for Indian Hotels.
news.summary:
AI poses risks and opportunities for India's IT sector; pivoting to enterprise AI consulting may slow revenue growth.
GREED & Fear reshuffles portfolio: Home First Finance replaced by Adani Power; Ixigo swapped for IndiGo; Lemon Tree for Indian Hotels.

news.title:
Kirloskar Brothers wins ₹214 crore order from Adani Power for thermal power pumps in MP, Assam, Chhattisgarh, Bihar.
Q3FY25 results show 44.5% net profit rise to ₹118.5 cr; shares trade 0.62% higher at ₹1,583.90, but down 20.46% in 6 months.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Brothers wins ₹214 crore order from Adani Power for thermal power pumps in MP, Assam, Chhattisgarh, Bihar.
Q3FY25 results show 44.5% net profit rise to ₹118.5 cr; shares trade 0.62% higher at ₹1,583.90, but down 20.46% in 6 months.

news.title: Adani Power wins 558 MW PPA from TNPDCL at ₹5.91/unit.
news.summary: Adani Power wins 558 MW PPA from TNPDCL at ₹5.91/unit.

news.title:
Bangladesh's new govt plans to renegotiate Adani Power deal to lower electricity and coal costs under a 25-year agreement.
Adani Power supplies electricity from its Jharkhand plant since 2023. Talks aim to avoid legal disputes and maintain bilateral ties.
news.summary:
Bangladesh's new govt plans to renegotiate Adani Power deal to lower electricity and coal costs under a 25-year agreement.
Adani Power supplies electricity from its Jharkhand plant since 2023. Talks aim to avoid legal disputes and maintain bilateral ties.
